title: mclient doesn't dump multi-colum unique constraint correctly
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_property(subject INT, p1 INT, p2 INT, CONSTRAINT unique_subject_p1 UNIQUE(subject, p1), CONSTRAINT unique_subject_p2 UNIQUE(subject, p2));
INSERT INTO test_property(subject, p1, p2) VALUES (1, 10, 20);
INSERT INTO test_property(subject, p1, p2) VALUES (1, 10, NULL);
INSERT INTO test_property(subject, p1, p2) VALUES (2, NULL, 30);
SELECT * FROM test_property WHERE subject IS NOT NULL AND p1 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: mclient fails on multi-column unique constraint dumping
